payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table seen close-up with a rectangular top visible at the upper left, two vertical square legs and a lower shelf cluttered with papers/boxes; surface appears worn and the piece is occluded by items (approx. 0.7 m from camera).
